Operation 'delete_webhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. The summary is concise and action-oriented, but the description is completely empty. Added context about required parameters, the effect of deletion (webhook stops triggering), and clarification that deletion is permanent. This helps AI agents understand the consequences of this destructive operation.

data.description_suggestion: Deletes a webhook automation by its ID. Requires the webhook ID as a path parameter. Once deleted, the webhook will no longer trigger automation events. This operation permanently removes the webhook configuration and cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: The summary is concise and action-oriented, but the description is completely empty. Added context about required parameters, the effect of deletion (webhook stops triggering), and clarification that deletion is permanent. This helps AI agents understand the consequences of this destructive operation.
